name: k6-boutique
description: k6 performance test suite for Online Boutique

scripts.smoke: npm run build && k6 run dist/test.main.js    -e CONFIG_FILE=../src/config/smoke.config.json
scripts.load: npm run build && k6 run dist/test.main.js    -e CONFIG_FILE=../src/config/load.config.json
scripts.stress: npm run build && k6 run dist/test.main.js    -e CONFIG_FILE=../src/config/stress.config.json
scripts.browser: npm run build && k6 run dist/test.browser.js -e CONFIG_FILE=../src/config/browser.config.json
